verses.text: Dan seeks land and sends out five spies. Dan. They look for an inheritance.
Dan seeks land and sends out five spies. Dan. They look for an inheritance.
They find Micah's Levite and ask counsel. Counsel. They consult the hired priest.
They find Micah's Levite and ask counsel. Counsel. They consult the hired priest.
They find Micah's Levite and ask counsel. Counsel. They consult the hired priest.
They find Micah's Levite and ask counsel. Counsel. They consult the hired priest.
They spy out quiet Laish and bring word. Laish. An easy prey is found.
They spy out quiet Laish and bring word. Laish. An easy prey is found.
They spy out quiet Laish and bring word. Laish. An easy prey is found.
They spy out quiet Laish and bring word. Laish. An easy prey is found.
Six hundred armed men set out. The march. The tribe moves to take it.
Six hundred armed men set out. The march. The tribe moves to take it.
Six hundred armed men set out. The march. The tribe moves to take it.
They take Micah's idols and ephod. Stolen. They seize the false gods.
They take Micah's idols and ephod. Stolen. They seize the false gods.

They persuade the Levite to come with them. Lured. He goes for a bigger flock.

Micah pursues but is outmatched and turns back. Helpless. He loses his gods.
Micah pursues but is outmatched and turns back. Helpless. He loses his gods.

They smite Laish and rename it Dan. Conquered. The defenceless city falls.
They smite Laish and rename it Dan. Conquered. The defenceless city falls.

They set up the graven image all the days of Shiloh. Idolatry. False worship takes root.
